FICC and Equities Sales and Trading - Quantitative Strats Summer Analyst 2027 Singapore

The FICC and Equities franchise at Goldman Sachs makes markets in fixed income, equity, currency and commodity products for institutional clients.

As a Summer Analyst in Quant Strats you will work with quantitative strategists on market-making models, pricing and risk for sales and trading desks across rates, FX and commodities, applying quantitative modelling to live markets problems.
